summary: test_user_turn_preserves_blocked_marker exercises a real service+store (no mocks), parametrizes blocked over both True and False, and asserts the reloaded-from-store task keeps that exact value after set_turn(USER) — a user-turn write that cleared blocked=True (the nearest violation, symmetric with the agent-turn clear pinned by the REQ-010.3.4 sibling) would fail it.
